query:
INSERT INTO levels (user_id, xp, total_xp, level, message_count, last_xp)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, now())
            ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE
            SET xp = EXCLUDED.xp,
                total_xp = EXCLUDED.total_xp,
                level = EXCLUDED.level,
                message_count = EXCLUDED.message_count,
                last_xp = now();
